name: reel_2026-04-20_002
caption:
Everyone says "just declutter." That's not the problem.

The problem is that nothing under your sink has a defined space, so when you put something back it just goes wherever — and the chaos resets within a week. Willpower doesn't beat geometry.

Stackable pull-out drawers — $32, BPA-free plastic, around 2,400 reviews at 4.6 stars. Took one afternoon to install. No screws, no brackets.

I've opened it every day for three weeks without bracing. The whole cabinet is visible in one glance.

name: reel_2026-04-20_003
caption:
I had the wrong pillow for a decade and didn't know it.

Stiff neck every morning. Rolled shoulder by lunch. I blamed my mattress. I blamed stress. I stacked two pillows, then one folded in half, then a towel roll under my neck. None of it fixed it because a flat pancake pillow plus a tower of other pillows is still the wrong height for a side sleeper.

The Eli & Elm side sleeper pillow — $89, adjustable shredded latex fill, curved cutout for your shoulder. 4.8 stars from over 2,400 reviews.

First morning I rolled my neck and nothing pulled. I actually laughed.
